articles.headline: Al Nassr coach quells injury fears after Cristiano Ronaldo limps off
articles.description: Al Nassr coach Jorge Jesus has played down fears that his captain, Cristiano Ronaldo, had suffered a serious injury after he limped off the pitch in Saturday's 3-1 league win over Al-Fayha.
